records.expected: PR summaries should start with risk, then proof, then implementation.
records.label: exact

records.expected: Use Chinese explanations for local reasoning and English descriptions for PR bodies.
records.label: exact

records.expected: Evidence should include exact commands, visible output, and one concise maintainer note.
records.label: exact

records.expected: Keep benchmark artifacts reproducible and avoid private account secrets in reports.
records.label: exact

records.expected: Prefer narrow adapter fixes over introducing a broad SDK before two platforms are proven.
records.label: exact

records.expected: Adapter proof markers must include agent-memory-local-proof when demonstrating local setup.
records.label: exact

records.expected: Codex adapter evidence must show the MCP tool call, not only final assistant prose.
records.label: exact

records.expected: Claude Code adapter evidence must include hook recall or capture proof from the local Gateway.
records.label: exact

records.expected: Benchmark reports should separate integration success from memory-effect accuracy.
records.label: exact

records.expected: Baseline runs must use isolated configuration without MCP servers or hooks.
records.label: exact

records.expected: The SDK route was deferred until at least two real adapters are validated.
records.label: exact

records.expected: Codex and Claude Code use MCP plus hooks because they lack OpenClaw-style in-process plugin APIs.
records.label: exact

records.expected: Hermes keeps its provider shape and talks to the same Gateway contract.
records.label: exact

records.expected: The benchmark compares no-memory baseline against MCP plus hooks only.
records.label: exact

records.expected: Computer Use screenshots are evidence, while JSON result files are the scoring authority.
records.label: exact

records.expected: The local Gateway proof port is 8420.
records.label: exact

records.expected: The local Gateway launch label is com.tencentdb.agent-memory.gateway.
records.label: exact

records.expected: The MCP server exposes memory_tencentdb_memory_search and memory_tencentdb_conversation_search.
records.label: exact

records.expected: UserPromptSubmit performs recall and Stop performs capture through the hook bridge.
records.label: exact

records.expected: The proof phrase says Codex and Claude Code are connected to TencentDB Agent Memory through the local MCP gateway.
